response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with experience in distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-driven development. They have worked with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and Docker, and have experience in technical strategy and stakeholder management.
strengths: Strong experience in full-stack development and distributed systems
Proven ability to work with AI-driven development and agentic workflows
Experience in technical strategy and stakeholder management
concerns: Limited direct experience in LLM, ML, or AI products
Basic German language skills may be a limitation in a Berlin-based team
No direct mention of experience with agile methodology in recent roles
